titleStmt.title: London, British Library, BL Oriental 12513
The Commentary of John Chrysostom on the Epistle to the Hebrews

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

item.desc: Amharic note concerning the purchase of this manuscript for five thalers by a certain ʾAfawarq

item.q: The Acts of the Apostles in the Ethiopic Language from King Theodore's Palace

binding.decoNote: Wooden boards, repaired in the British Museum.

history.origin: 17th century According to Catalogue of Ethiopian Manuscripts in the British Library acquired since the Year 1877StefanStrelcynLondonBritish Museum1978EthiopicCataloguingBritish Museumbm:Strelcyn1978BritishLibraryEthiopicCataloguingBritish Museumbm:Strelcyn1978BritishLibrary98, the manuscript as a whole can be dated to the 17th century, but the first three folios "seem to have been added later". For the dating of the manuscript Strelcyn is probably relying on palaeography.
history.acquisition: Presented by the Wellcome Institute, January 1961.

bibl.title: Catalogue of Ethiopian Manuscripts in the British Library acquired since the Year 1877

msItem.title: Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Life of John Chrysostom
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ዘለዓለም፡ ንዌጥን፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ በሥነ፡ ሀብቱ፡ ጽሒፈ፡ ዜናሁ፡ ለአቡነ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ሊቀ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ዘቍስጥንጥያ፡ ዘተረክበ፡ እመጽሐፈ፡ ታሪክ፡ ዘጸሐፎ፡ ጊዮርጊስ፡ ወልደ፡ አሜድ። ወዓዲ፡ እመጽሐፈ፡ ስንክሳር፡ ወአቡሻክር፡ ወእመጽሐፈ፡ መደብር፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ዘትርጓሜሁ፡ ሠራዒ፡ ዝንቱ፡ አብ፡ ኮነ፡ እምሰብአ፡ ሀገረ፡ አንጾኪያ። ወአቡሁ፡ ኮነ፡ እምብዑላኒሃ፡ ለይእቲ፡ ሀገር፡

msItem.title: Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān
Table of contents
msItem.note: Giving the titles of the homilies (dǝrsān) and of the admonitions (tagśāṣ) arranged in thirty-four chapters. In our table, which is a copy of another manuscript, the number probably indicate the pages corresponding to the beginning of the different parts of the Commentary in that exemplar. The last number given is 272.

msItem.title: Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Summary, table of the 34 homilies
msItem.incipit: ዕዘዝ፡ ወልዑልና፡ ወኃይል፡ ወዕበይ፡ ይደሉ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘይትወሐድ፡ በመለኮት፡ ወይሤለስ፡ በአካላት፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ ንቀድም፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚእነ፡ ኢየሱስ፡ ክርስቶስ። ሕያው፡ ቀዳማዊ፡ በጽሒፈ፡ ትርጓሜ፡ ዘተርጉመ፡ አቡነ፡ ክቡር፡ በውስተ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ። ዜና፡ መልእክቱ፡ ለብፁዕ፡ ሐዋርያ፡ አምላካዊ፡ ጳውሎስ፡ ኀበ፡ አይሁድ። ወተርጉማ፡ እምልሳነ፡ ዮናናውያን፡ ኀበ፡ ልሳነ፡ ዓረቢ፡ ወንስአሎ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ከመ፡ ይረድአነ፡ ወይምሐረነ፡ ውስተ፡ ርትዕ፡ በቃል፡ ወበምግባር፡ ወያድኅነነ፡ እምዳኅፅ፡ በትንብልናሃ፡ ለእግዝእትነ፡ ማርያም፡ ወላዲተ፡ አምላክ፡ ወኵሎሙ፡ ቅዱሳን።

msItem.title: Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Introduction by
msItem.incipit: ፍካሬ፡ ዘይቤ፡ አቡነ፡ ዓቢይ፡ በውስተ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ርእሰ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶሳት፡ ዘሀገረ፡ ቍስጥንጥንያ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ አፈ፡ ወርቅ፡

msItem.title: Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: 34 Homilies, each divided into a and a with distinct titles
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 1

Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 28

Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 28
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 29
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Dǝrsān 29
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 29
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 30
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Dǝrsān 30
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 30
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 31
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Dǝrsān 31
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 31
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 32
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Dǝrsān 32
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 32
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 33
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Dǝrsān 33
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 33
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Homily 34
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Dǝrsān 34
Tǝrgʷāme malʾǝkt za-bǝṣuʿ wa-kǝbur Ṗāwlos za-ṣaḥafa la-ʿƎbrāwǝyān: Tagśāṣ 34

colophon.note: The date given according to the Era of the Martyrs (1239 = 1522/1523 CE) is the only one, which is correct. The date according to the Era of the World (7005) must be corrected to 7015 and the date according to the Ethiopian Era (1005) to 1515. The last mistake occurs also in London, British Library, BL Oriental 737.
colophon.q: ወይእዜኒ፡ ተተርጐመት፡ እምልሳነ፡ ዓረቢ፡ ለግዕዝ፡ በአፈ፡ እንባቆም፡ ወሚካኤል፡ በ፸፻ወ፲፭ዓመተ፡ ምሕረት። ወእምልደተ፡ ክርስቶስ፡ መድኃኒነ፡ በ፲፻፭፻ወ፲ወ፭ዓመት፡ ወእምዓመተ፡ ሰማዕታትኒ፡ በ፲፻ወ፪፻፴ወ፱ዓመት። ወፍጻሜሃኒ፡ ኮነ፡ በዕለተ፡ ሰኑይ፡ አመ፡ ሠሉሱ፡ ለወርኃ፡ ነሐሴ።

supportDesc.collation: The codicological unit is composed of eighteen quires with quire marks and one front endleaf.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Corrections after reviews by Denis Nosnitsin and Eugenia Sokolinski
